headline: OpenAI monetizes ChatGPT with prompt-based ad targeting system
body: OpenAI's advertising partner StackAdapt is now selling ad placements within ChatGPT based on prompt relevance, marking the company's move into behavioral ad targeting within its AI interface. This development signals how generative AI platforms are extracting commercial value from user interactions at the point of query. For healthcare AI vendors and consultants, this raises immediate questions about data governance, patient privacy compliance, and whether clinical workflows built on ChatGPT require additional regulatory review. The monetization model also reflects broader vendor consolidation risks: reliance on third-party AI platforms for healthcare use cases now includes exposure to evolving ad and data practices that may conflict with HIPAA requirements or institutional policies.
